purpose: Track OCEAN assessments that are relevant but not fully stored because item, scoring, commercial-use, clinical, or proprietary permissions require review.

policy.use: construct reference, validation planning, or license-review queue only

instruments.name: Big Five Inventory
instruments.reason_not_imported: Need authoritative item and commercial/product permission review before storing or administering.

instruments.name: Big Five Inventory-2
instruments.reason_not_imported: Strong 15-facet reference, but item storage and product-use permission must be verified.

instruments.name: 10-item short version of the Big Five Inventory
instruments.reason_not_imported: Very short comparator; item storage and scoring permission require review.

instruments.name: NEO PI-R / NEO-PI-3 / NEO-FFI
instruments.reason_not_imported: Proprietary family of instruments; do not reproduce or administer without appropriate license and qualified-use review.

instruments.name: HEXACO Personality Inventory-Revised
instruments.reason_not_imported: Adjacent six-factor instrument; confirm research, teaching, commercial, translation, and item-storage terms before use.

instruments.name: International English Big-Five Mini-Markers
instruments.reason_not_imported: Adjective marker inventory should be reviewed for item and reuse permissions before storing.

instruments.name: Single-Item Measure of Personality
instruments.reason_not_imported: Very brief comparator referenced by TIPI materials; item text and reuse permissions require review.
